boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-XOR-078-P requires deviation closure match batch, assay, criterion, date

final_answer: Action may not proceed. CLOSE-XOR-078 covers batch X-79 while action targets X-78; DEV-XOR-078 alert remains visible. STD-XOR-078-P requires exact match on batch, assay, criterion and date before release. Source boundary remains open.
